news.headline: US gov't could potentially add Bitcoin to its National Reserve next year. Find out the impact on prices in our video.
news.summary: In a recent video featured on Cointelegraph, the focus was on the possibility of the US establishing a Bitcoin reserve in the upcoming year, along with analyzing the potential effects this move could have on prices. The video delves into the likelihood of such a development and its implications for the market.

news.headline: Blackrock Investment Institute in 2025 outlook: We think the Fed will cut rates further but with inflation still above target it won’t have room to cut much past 4%.
Bitfinex Pay introduces Merchant Dashboard update (v0.7.5) with Polygon support and improved payment processing.
news.summary: Bitfinex Pay recently launched version 0.7.5, which includes updates to the Merchant Dashboard. These enhancements bring added support for tokens within the Polygon Ecosystem and improvements to the payment processing system. This update aims to streamline and optimize the user experience for merchants utilizing Bitfinex Pay.

news.headline: Predicted crypto trends for 2025: AI + blockchain, stablecoin adoption, and onchain govt bonds - insights from a16z crypto.
news.summary: Discover the major cryptocurrency trends expected for the year 2025, as per insights from a16z crypto. These include the increasing influence of Artificial Intelligence in blockchain technology, the rise in adoption of stablecoins by businesses, and the implementation of onchain government bonds. These trends are anticipated to shape the crypto landscape in the upcoming years, indicating a significant shift towards technological advancements and financial innovation. Explore more on this subject to stay informed about the future of digital currencies.

news.headline: Wormhole initiates staking program for W token holders on Solana & EVM chains, boosting governance and rewards.
news.summary: Wormhole has recently launched a Staking Rewards Program aimed at W token holders participating on Solana and EVM chains. This initiative is designed to improve governance processes and boost rewards for users within the Wormhole ecosystem. This program offers a unique opportunity for W token holders to actively engage in the platform and benefit from staking activities on both Solana and EVM chains. Through this program, participants can contribute to the network's operations and governance while earning rewards based on their staked W tokens. Overall, this new development is set to enhance user participation and incentivize engagement within the Wormhole ecosystem across different chains.

news.headline: Logicalis merges German operations under one leadership, headed by Jürgen Hatzipantelis for increased efficiency.
news.summary: London, December 4, 2024 - Logicalis has introduced a revised operational framework in Germany to capitalize on their combined strengths throughout the region. This initiative consolidates various entities such as Siticom, iTuma, Orange Networks, and Logicalis Germany into a single unified structure.

news.headline: Research by Forisk shows tracking wood demand concentration benefits timber investors & firms. Timely info for risk management.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Athens, Georgia, a study conducted by Forisk revealed that monitoring wood demand concentration at the firm level in regional timber markets aids in risk mitigation and capital distribution for investors in timberland and wood-related businesses. This research emphasizes the importance of analyzing this data to make informed decisions.

GM faces billions in charges due to impairment of equity interest in SAIC General Motors Corporation. Shares trade lower as company evaluates impact and expects to recognize additional losses.
news.summary: On Wednesday, General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) experienced a drop in shares following the decision to write down its equity interest in SAIC General Motors Corporation Limited (SGM). The company deemed this impairment necessary due to a decrease in the value of its investments in specific China joint ventures. As a result, GM is assessing the consequences of SGM's restructuring plans and recent initiatives aimed at enhancing market share and financial performance. General Motors anticipates recognizing around ... in additional equity losses.

news.headline: Blackrock Investment Institute's 2025 outlook: Revises long US treasuries to underweight from neutral.
Dollar Tree reports Q3 EPS of $1.12, sales of $7.57 billion, and same-store sales increase of 1.8%. Family Dollar same-store sales up 1.9%.
news.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ:DLTR) posted a third-quarter adjusted EPS of $1.12, marking a 15.5% rise from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $1.07. The discount variety store chain's sales for the quarter reached $7.57 billion, indicating a 3.5% increase from a year earlier and exceeding the expected $7.44 billion. Enterprise same-store net sales saw a 1.8% uptick, fueled by a 1.6% rise in traffic and a 0.2% climb in average ticket. Dollar Tree witnessed a similar 1.8% increase in same-store net sales, with traffic up by 1.5% and average ticket up by 0.3%. Family Dollar reported a 1.9% rise in same-store net sales, driven by a 1.8% surge in traffic and a flat average ticket. Dollar Tree remains dedicated to finalizing its formal review.

news.headline: Eli Lilly's Zepbound offers 47% greater weight loss than Novo Nordisk's Wegovy, with Zepbound showing an average weight loss of 20.2% compared to Wegovy's 13.7%.
news.summary: Eli Lilly And Co (LLY) recently disclosed data from the SURMOUNT-5 phase 3b trial, comparing the effectiveness and safety of Zepbound (tirzepatide) with Novo Nordisk A/S’ Wegovy (semaglutide) in adults with obesity or overweight with certain comorbidities. The trial included individuals without diabetes. Zepbound demonstrated a 47% higher relative weight loss than Wegovy. In detailed phase 3 data, Zepbound showcased a superior weight loss of 20.2% on average compared to 13.7% with Wegovy. Of note, 99% of Mounjaro/Zepbound patients remained diabetes-free even after 3 years. To access the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GM faces billions in charges due to decline in value of its China joint ventures. Stocks trading lower as equity losses expected.
news.summary: General Motors Company, listed on NYSE as GM, saw a decline in share price after deciding to write off a significant portion of its equity stake in SAIC General Motors Corporation Limited (SGM). The company made this choice due to a decrease in the value of its investments in some China joint ventures. It is currently assessing the effects of SGM's restructuring plans and recent measures to enhance market share and profitability. General Motors anticipates incurring further equity losses amounting to approximately [specific amount not provided]. For more information, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Aramco partners with Linde and Schlumberger in a CCS hub; Aramco holds 60%, Linde and SLB each 20%.
news.summary: Aramco, the leading oil giant in Saudi Arabia, has signed a shareholders' agreement with Linde plc and Schlumberger N.V. to create a significant Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) hub, slated to become one of the world's largest. In this project, Aramco will possess a majority stake of 60%, while Linde and SLB will each have a 20% ownership. The establishment of this CCS hub marks a crucial move in Aramco's efforts to reduce emissions. This initiative signifies a major step forward in achieving environmental goals.

Investor rights law firm investigating PFIE, AVTE, EVGR for violations, breaches of fiduciary duties, shares potential concerns.
news.summary: A legal firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, in New York, announced on December 4, 2024, that they are investigating several companies for potential violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is Profire Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: PFIE). This investigation is being conducted in relation to shareholder interests.

news.headline: Blackrock Investment Institute's 2025 outlook: revises short US Treasuries to neutral from underweight.
Experian acquires Audigent - boosts identity and activation capabilities in advertising. Expands data integration.
news.summary: Experian, a global data and technology company based in Costa Mesa, California, has recently completed the acquisition of Audigent, a prominent data activation and identity platform within the advertising sector. This acquisition signifies Experian's commitment to expanding its already robust marketing data and identity offerings in the advertising domain. Through Audigent's first-party publisher data and extensive inventory network, Experian now possesses enhanced capabilities in sell-side distribution to complement its existing demand-side operations. This strategic move strengthens Experian's position in the advertising industry, solidifying its comprehensive suite of services.

news.headline: Britive's PAM platform poised for growth in multi-cloud environments with partner-driven innovation. LOS ANGELES, Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 4, 2024, Britive, a prominent provider of cloud-native privileged access management solutions, announced plans to enhance growth under the guidance of their patented PAM platform. The company is focusing on strategic leadership and a steadfast dedication to innovation driven by partners. This move is aimed at reshaping the approach enterprises take to secure their systems.

news.headline: 1,700 vineyard employees prioritize new skills, technologies, and roots according to largest survey ever taken.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, as of December 4, 2024, around 1,700 employees working in vineyards actively participated in a significant survey. This survey stands out as the most extensive one conducted on vineyard workers to date. The findings of the survey offer valuable insights into the career aspirations and job-related preferences of individuals employed in the vineyard industry.

Global Commercial Cleaning Services Market is expected to reach USD 443.23 Billion by 2033, with a 6.7% CAGR.Increased demand due to health awareness, tech advancements, outsourcing, green practices, regulations, and urbanization drive sector growth.
news.summary: The global Commercial Cleaning Services Market was valued at approximately USD 247.50 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 262.35 billion in 2024, with a projected market size of around USD 443.23 billion by 2033, at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 6.7% during the forecast period 2024 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include increased health and hygiene awareness due to the COVID-19 pandemic, technological advancements in cleaning equipment, a shift towards sustainability and green cleaning practices, outsourcing trends in businesses, regulatory compliance requirements, and urbanization and infrastructure development in emerging economies. Partnerships and acquisitions in the market include Aramark Corporation's exclusive partnership with Healthcare Plus Solutions Group and Anago Cleaning Systems' franchise expansion in Nebraska.

Report highlights top 20 water and sewage projects per region in Q4 2024 with total project values and funding analysis.
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released the "Project Insight - Global Water and Sewage Construction Projects (Q4 2024)" report, which is now available for purchase. The report offers detailed analysis of construction projects worldwide, including total project values, stage breakdowns, and funding analysis across different regions. It lists the top 20 projects in each region, along with details such as country, project stage, and value. Additionally, the report features rankings of the primary operators in the sector, highlighting the leading contractors in the industry. This comprehensive report provides valuable insights for stakeholders interested in the water and sewage construction projects, aiding in decision-making and strategic planning.

news.headline: Kevin DeMeritt discusses precious metals, 'End the Fed' movement on 'Redacted News' podcast - highlighting issues including declining US dollar and 24% economic decline.
news.summary: In a recent interview on the “Redacted News” podcast, Kevin DeMeritt, CEO of Lear Capital, discussed the implications of abolishing the Federal Reserve and the outlook for precious metals markets. DeMeritt emphasized the increasing advocacy for a return to the gold standard in response to worries about the weakening global standing of the U.S. dollar and the historically high national debt, now at record levels. He underscored key economic factors influencing market confidence, such as the 24% drop in a relevant indicator.

This marks the species' comeback to Saudi Arabia after being absent for over a hundred years. The initiative began in April 2024 when seven Persian onagers were...

news.headline: Barney's Farm Genetics, Sensi Seeds, & ILGM merge, serving growers in Europe and NA. Deal announced on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: A recent business merger has united three top cannabis genetics providers to cater to growers in Europe and North America. This collaboration combines Barney's Farm Genetics, a renowned global cannabis seed breeder recognized for its distinct and inventive approach, with two other leading companies. The merger, announced on December 4, 2024, is set to revolutionize the industry and offer cutting-edge genetics to a wide market. This development signifies a major step forward in the cannabis sector, impacting growers worldwide.

news.headline: NM dementia care provider launches program to train caregivers with arts-based, research-driven methods. No artistic experience required.
news.summary: A program called The ART of High-Performance Caregiving has been introduced by ESTEAM Health in Rio Rancho, N.M., on December 4, 2024. It aims to equip caregivers in providing compassionate and personalized care for dementia and aging needs. The training is arts-based and research-driven, and does not require any artistic experience. This innovative program will enhance the skills of caregivers to deliver quality care to individuals in need.

news.headline: Hyperliquid (HYPE) cryptocurrency surges 274% in 7 days, reaching $11.77 and $3.2 billion market cap; trader predicts significant growth potential.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency Hyperliquid (CRYPTO: HYPE) is experiencing a significant surge in value, increasing by a remarkable 274% within just a week. This surge is attributed to the positive investor sentiment surrounding its innovative model and the significant impact it is making within the community. The surge was further exemplified by a crypto trader who received $800,000 worth of HYPE through an airdrop at the end of November, showcasing the potential rewards for early adopters of the platform.As of the latest data, the price of Hyperliquid stands at $11.77, with a market capitalization of $3.2 billion. Over the past 24 hours, the price has increased by 28%, while the 7-day trend shows an impressive rise of 267.9%. Other cryptocurrencies such as Jupiter (CRYPTO: JUP) and Raydium (CRYPTO: RAY) have also seen positive trends, with Jupiter priced at $1.32, boasting a market cap of $1.78 billion, and a 7-day trend increase of 23%. Raydium is currently priced at $5.10, with a market cap of $1.48 billion, showing a moderate 3.9% increase in the last 24 hours but a decline of 10% over the past week.Noteworthy figures within the crypto trading community, like prominent trader Ansem, have projected that HYPE has the potential to ascend and establish itself as one of the top five protocols in the market. For more details on this developing story, the full coverage is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Watts Water Technologies, based in North Andover, Massachusetts, has been recognized as one of "America's Most Responsible Companies 2025" by Newsweek. This prestigious accolade acknowledges the company's commitment to corporate responsibility and sustainability. This recognition highlights Watts Water Technologies as a leading organization in promoting ethical business practices and environmental stewardship.

news.headline: BULGOLD (TSXV: ZLTO) plans to extend expiration of 3,683,413 warrants from Dec 23, 2024 to June 23, 2028 pending TSXV approval.
news.summary: TORONTO, December 4, 2024 - BULGOLD Inc. (TSXV: ZLTO) has announced plans to extend the expiry dates of 3,683,413 common share purchase warrants that were issued on June 23, 2023, and July 7, 2023. These warrants, set to expire on December 23, 2024, are now intended to be extended to June 23, 2028. The Company has requested approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for this extension, and holders of the warrants will not receive new certificates. The approval of the TSXV is required for the extension to take effect.

news.headline: El Salvador's digital asset issuer secures $30M from US Treasury sale, joining industry trend with NexBridge, BlackRock, and Franklin Templeton.
news.summary: NexBridge's recently launched offering of US Treasury bills reflects a growing trend in the financial sector, with similar initiatives from industry rivals such as BlackRock and Franklin Templeton. This development highlights the increasing popularity of US Treasury bills among investors and indicates a shift towards secure and reliable investment opportunities. The competition in this market segment is intensifying, with NexBridge facing off against notable competitors as they tap into a lucrative market. The demand for US Treasury bills is evident as financial institutions vie for a share of this sector, underlining the appeal of these instruments in today's market.

news.headline: ThroughPut.AI introduces EOQ and MOQ recommendations for inventory management, enhancing efficiency and profitability.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI-powered Supply Chain Decision Intelligence system enhances inventory management by providing optimized order suggestions based on economic order quantity (EOQ) and minimum order quantity (MOQ) adjustments. This innovative platform, based in Palo Alto, California, was introduced on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: IcomTech promoter, David Brend, gets 10-year prison term; must report to Florida jail by Dec 16 for 120-month term.
news.summary: David Brend has been instructed by the judge to surrender himself to a federal prison in Florida no later than December 16. This comes as part of his 120-month sentence.

news.headline: Fiamma raises $4M in seed round led by Lightspeed Faction and L2 Iterative Ventures to revolutionize Bitcoin with ZK solutions.
news.summary: Fiamma, a company based in Singapore, revealed on December 4, 2024, its plans to revolutionize Bitcoin by integrating trust-minimized and ZK infrastructure solutions. The company aims to transform Bitcoin into a dynamic and programmable asset. Fiamma announced an oversubscribed investment to support this initiative, with significant funding being allocated towards leveraging these solutions. The investment is expected to bring about fundamental changes in the way Bitcoin operates, enhancing its capabilities and functionality.

news.headline: Japanese skincare brand Tatcha now offered at all Ulta Beauty stores nationwide, bringing luxury beauty to more customers.
news.summary: Tatcha, a renowned Japanese skincare brand, is extending its intentional luxury offerings to reach more beauty enthusiasts. The brand will now be accessible at all Ulta Beauty outlets across the country and on their online platform. This expansion, effective from December 4, 2024, aims to introduce Tatcha's transformative products to a wider audience.

news.headline: El Salvador's digital platform secures $30M from US Treasury sale, joining trend in finance with competitors like BlackRock.
news.summary: NexBridge has introduced a new offering involving tokenized US Treasury bills, which reflects a growing trend in the financial sector. This initiative brings NexBridge in line with competitors such as BlackRock and Franklin Templeton who are also exploring similar ventures.
